vocab.meaning: bắt đầu một sở thích mới
vocab.example: I decided to take up gardening during the lockdown to bring some greenery into my living space.

vocab.meaning: trang hoàng, làm cho đẹp đẽ/tươi mới hơn
vocab.example: I bought a few succulent plants to spruce up my study desk and make it feel more inviting.

vocab.meaning: chết dần chết mòn (lần lượt từng cái một)
vocab.example: To be honest, I'm not very good with flora; most of the herbs I tried to grow ended up dying off due to lack of sunlight.
Having a plant requires a lot of commitment because you have to look after it daily and ensure it’s properly watered.

vocab.meaning: làm cho rạng rỡ, sáng sủa hơn
vocab.example: My mother gave me a peace lily, and it really brightens up the dull corner of my living room.

vocab.meaning: lớn nhanh như thổi, phát triển nhanh chóng
vocab.example: I was surprised at how quickly the sunflower seeds I planted began to shoot up after just a week of rain.

vocab.meaning: tìm hiểu kỹ bằng cách đọc nhiều tài liệu
vocab.example: Before buying an orchid, I had to read up on its specific care instructions as they are notoriously difficult to keep alive.
My fascination with indoor plants stems from my childhood memories of my grandmother's lush garden.
Every spring, I have to cut back the overgrown ivy on my balcony to keep it looking tidy.
It was heartbreaking when I had to toss out my favorite fern because it had become completely withered.
